overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic urban plaza in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring towering skyscrapers with digital billboards, palm trees, and modern architecture. The camera moves from a covered walkway into an open area while tilting upward to reveal the cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated transit structure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily forward under the covered walkway, observing the surrounding architecture and nearby pedestrians

notable_agents.action: woman in white top walking alongside the camera path
man in dark clothing walking near the palm trees

entered.detail: large wooden and metal elevated structure spanning across the walkway with visible support beams
large horizontal digital screen displaying colorful flower graphics on building facade
tall vertical digital billboard with large white text spelling BIG on dark building
group of tall palm trees lining the right side of the pedestrian street
tall building with distinctive orange-brown brick exterior and multiple windows
dark gray industrial structure with corrugated metal panels
green canopy structure at ground level near the walkway
vertical red signage with white text near the ground level

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk under a covered pedestrian walkway in a futuristic city. The camera moves forward beneath a large wooden overhead bridge structure, with digital billboards visible on surrounding buildings including a prominent 'BIG' sign. Palm trees line the right side where two pedestrians walk alongside the camera. The atmosphere is bright and sunny with partial sky visibility through the overhead structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with towering skyscrapers

events.description: camera begins tilting upward to focus on the skyline and upper building facades
moving from semi-covered walkway into fully open plaza with unobstructed sky view

agents.ego_description: continuing forward while tilting the camera upward to admire the towering buildings and billboards above

entered.detail: large curved white architectural structure entering from the right side of the frame

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the covered walkway into an open urban plaza, tilting upward to reveal the full height of the surrounding skyscrapers against a clear blue sky. The pedestrians from the previous segment have moved out of view, and a distinctive curved white architectural structure enters the frame from the right. The perspective emphasizes the vertical scale of the futuristic cityscape with palm trees and massive digital billboards framing the view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sheltered pedestrian corridor into a vast, open-air futuristic plaza. It begins by gliding beneath a large wooden overhead bridge, passing digital billboards and palm trees while pedestrians walk alongside the camera in the bright sunlight. As the camera emerges from the covered walkway, the perspective shifts from the enclosed path to an expansive urban square. The scene then opens upward in a sweeping tilt, revealing the towering height of surrounding skyscrapers and massive digital displays against a clear blue sky. Finally, the view expands to include a distinctive curved white architectural structure on the right, emphasizing the immense vertical scale of the cityscape.
